sections.title: Antiphon #172
sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: I am the salvation of the people, says the Lord. Should they cry to me in any distress, I will hear them, and I will be their Lord forever.

sections.title: Psalm 113:1-2, 4-6, 7-8
sections.author: Chris Muglia
sections.snippet: Praise the Lord who lifts up the poor.

sections.author: cf. 2 Cor 8:9
sections.snippet: Though our Lord Jesus Christ was rich, he became poor, so that by his poverty you might become rich.
sections.title: Alleluia
The Jesus Song
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, have mercy on me. Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, have mercy on me. Amen.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: I am the Good Shepherd, says the Lord; I know my sheep, and mine know me. I am the Good Shepherd, says the Lord; I know my sheep, and mine know me.
sections.title: Antiphon #174
The Body of Christ
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: This is the Body of Christ, beautiful, broken and blessed; miracle of the greatest of loves, presence of God in our midst. This is the Cup that he shares, endlessly emptied and poured; sacrifice made so that we might be saved now and forevermore.

sections.title: The Beautitudes
sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the Kingdom of Heaven. Blessed are those who mourn for they will be comforted. Blessed are the meek, for they will inherit the earth. Blessed are those who hunger and thirst for righteousness, for they will be filled.

sections.title: May Your Kingdom Come
sections.author: Steve Angrisano, Sarah Hart, and Curtis Stephan/Vocal arr. by Rick Modlin
sections.snippet: Spirit of God, fill us with fire, to shine your light for all those in need. Give us the strength to love in your name, so all the world will come to believe.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
